prompt_text:
### Demographics: 52-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~11.2 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 77.6 kg; Height 153.6 cm; BMI 32.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 127/91 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.0%; 9 months ago 7.8%; 6 months ago 7.7%; 3 months ago 8.1%; current 8.3%), FPG (12 months ago 165mg/dL; 9 months ago 171mg/dL; 6 months ago 197mg/dL; 3 months ago 202mg/dL; current 172mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 80.3kg; 9 months ago 76.7kg; 6 months ago 73.9kg; 3 months ago 75.8kg; current 77.6kg), Height (12 months ago 153.6cm; 9 months ago 153.6cm; 6 months ago 153.6cm; 3 months ago 153.6cm; current 153.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 32.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 125mmHg; 9 months ago 124mmHg; 6 months ago 127mmHg; 3 months ago 130mmHg; current 127mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 91mmHg; 9 months ago 87mmHg; 6 months ago 89mmHg; 3 months ago 91mmHg; current 91mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 29U/L; 9 months ago 33U/L; 6 months ago 25U/L; 3 months ago 24U/L; current 32U/L), AST (12 months ago 24U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 15U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 21U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 80mg/g; 9 months ago 58mg/g; 6 months ago 80mg/g; 3 months ago 58mg/g; current 75mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 79mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 83mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 51mg/dL; 9 months ago 48mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 49mg/dL; current 50mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 172mg/dL; 9 months ago 167mg/dL; 6 months ago 168mg/dL; 3 months ago 170mg/dL; current 178mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.2g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 13.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
